# Oskar Wichtowski

> AI Engineer and Fullstack Developer building practical AI products, LLM integrations, ecommerce automations, and full-stack applications.

Oskar Wichtowski is an AI Engineer and Fullstack Developer focused on turning rough product ideas into working systems. His work includes AI-powered web applications, LLM service integrations, Shopify and ecommerce automation, recommendation engine PoCs, backend services, and production-minded full-stack development.

- [Home](https://oskarwichtowski.com/)

- [Articles](https://oskarwichtowski.com/articles)
- [GitHub Activity](https://oskarwichtowski.com/github)
- [Contact](https://oskarwichtowski.com/contact)

## Areas of work

- AI-powered applications
- Object detection
- LLM integrations
- Full-stack web development
- Backend systems and automation
- Recommendation systems and PoCs
- QA-minded engineering and code auditing
